title: Pumpkin Carver
description: This datapack allows you to carve your own design into a pumpkin!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92a19a26ef2f3f87551d6064c3e5b2c49db6c6a3_0.webp)<center> 
  
[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0cf0180cbd5c4367ffae3af2f032bb768cd1a56.png)](https://discord.com/invite/eZEHeNbzUE) [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea2b7719efdde91eec7c454f534788ffc096c9e5.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@GoldenRobotII)
</center>

## About
This datapack adds a knife which allows you to carve your own designs into pumpkins! Drop a torch on to them to turn them into Jack o'Lanterns! Made specifically for halloween.

## Overview
Watch this video for an explanation about the datapack:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_RNGs39fCIo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## Download
If you don't know how to download the datapack and resourcepack, follow these steps.
<details>
<summary>Add Data Pack to new world</summary>


1. Select the version you want and download the **pumpkin-carver-<version>-dp.zip** file
2. Click **Create new world** in minecraft 
3. Click **More**, then **Data Packs**
4. Drag the **pumpkin-carver-<version>-dp.zip** file into there, and make sure you put it on the **selected** side (right side)




</details>
<details>
<summary>Add Data Pack to existing World</summary>


1. Select the version you want and download the **pumpkin-carver-<version>-dp.zip** file
2. Select your world in minecraft 
3. Click **Edit** at the bottom of the screen
4. Click **Open World Folder**
5. Click the **datapacks** folder
6. Drag the **pumpkin-carver-<version>-dp.zip** file into there


</details>
<details>
<summary>Install Resource Pack</summary>

To find the resource pack, click on the version you want and scroll down. Make sure to download the 'required resource pack'
1. Select the version you want and download the **pumpkin-carver-<version>-rp.zip** file
2. Click **Options** in minecraft
3. Click **Resource Packs**
4. Drag the **pumpkin-carver-<version>-rp.zip** file into there, and make sure you put it on the **selected** side (right side)


</details>
